points.text: Tiziana Life Sciences dosed the last patient in its Phase 2 INFORM-MS trial for foralumab, a fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody, targeting non-active secondary progressive multiple sclerosis (na-SPMS).
Foralumab is the only fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody currently in clinical development, utilizing an intranasal delivery route to stimulate T regulatory cells.
An open-label Expanded Access Program (NCT06802328) for intranasal foralumab dosed 14 patients with na-SPMS, showing disease improvement or stability within 6 months for all participants.
RQ Bio secured $115 million (£85.5 million) in Series A financing led by Frazier Life Sciences to advance RQB01, a long-acting antibody program for full-season influenza prevention.
Artiva Biotherapeutics presented EULAR 2026 data for AlloNK (AB-101), an allogeneic NK cell therapy, in combination with rituximab (a monoclonal antibody) for refractory rheumatoid arthritis.
Coherus Oncology reported Q1 2026 net revenue of $11.8 million for LOQTORZI (toripalimab-tpzi), a PD-1 monoclonal antibody, representing a 61% year-over-year increase.
DelveInsight's IgA Nephropathy Pipeline Insight 2026 identifies 25+ companies developing 30+ drugs, including monoclonal antibodies Zigakibart, Felzartamab, and NM8074 (Ruxoprubart).

Merck received FDA approval for Keytruda (pembrolizumab) and Keytruda Qlex in combination with Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan) as first-line treatment for PD-L1+ (CPS ≥10) advanced triple-negative breast cancer.
Chugai Pharma's Avastin (bevacizumab), a monoclonal antibody, received approval in Japan for an additional indication.
Rituxan (rituximab), a monoclonal antibody, received approval in Japan for an additional dosage regimen against certain nephrotic syndrome.

TrueLab granted Bionyra exclusive worldwide rights (excluding Greater China) to TL-001, an anti-TL1A monoclonal antibody, and TL-003, a TL1A × IL-23p19 bispecific antibody, in a deal valued at ~$985M.

AbbVie entered a definitive agreement to acquire Apogee Therapeutics for ~$10.9B ($135.11/share), adding the late-stage half-life-extended monoclonal antibody zumilokibart (APG777) targeting IL-13 for atopic dermatitis.
TrueLab will receive a single-digit equity stake in Bionyra following Bionyra's $165M Series A financing co-led by Jeito Capital and Sofinnova Partners.
Apogee Therapeutics' pipeline includes APG273, a combination of the monoclonal antibody zumilokibart and APG333 (anti-TSLP mAb), developed for asthma.

MappBio — MBP-134 — Bundibugyo ebolavirus — Monoclonal antibody selected for Phase 2/3 clinical trial in Democratic Republic of the Congo to assess efficacy against fast-growing outbreak with 1,118 confirmed cases.

Rutgers Cancer Institute highlighted phase 3 frontMIND trial results for tafasitamab (Monjuvi), a CD19-directed monoclonal antibody, combined with lenalidomide and R-CHOP in newly diagnosed high-risk diffuse large B-cell lymphoma (DLBCL).
EHA 2026 presented phase 3 SOUNDTRACK-F1 trial safety run-in data for surovatamig (AZD0486), a bispecific antibody targeting CD20 and CD3, in previously untreated follicular lymphoma.
ASCO 2026 featured phase 2 study data for epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly), a CD20xCD3 bispecific antibody, combined with R-miniCVP in elderly and frail patients with newly diagnosed DLBCL.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Foralumab — Non-active Secondary Progressive Multiple Sclerosis — Phase 2 INFORM- trial completed dosing; intranasal fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody stimulates T regulatory cells.
RQ Bio — RQB01 — Full-season influenza prevention — $115M Series A financing completed; IND-enabling studies ongoing for dual-mechanism long-acting antibody targeting conserved epitopes.
Artiva Biotherapeutics — AlloNK + rituximab — Refractory Rheumatoid Arthritis — FDA granted RMAT designation; Phase 2a basket trial showed 71% ACR50 response at 6 months in 31 patients.

Coherus Oncology / Zumutor Biologics — ZM008 + LOQTORZI (toripalimab-tpzi) — Combination therapy for oncology indications — Clinical collaboration announced to evaluate ZM008 with the anti-PD-1 monoclonal antibody toripalimab.

Novartis / Vertex / Biogen / AstraZeneca / Roche — Zigakibart, Felzartamab, NM8074, ULTOMIRIS — IgA Nephropathy — Multiple monoclonal antibodies in active clinical development with 12+ candidates in late-stage trials.
Merck — Keytruda (pembrolizumab) + Trodelvy (sacituzumab govitecan) — Advanced PD-L1+ (CPS ≥10) triple-negative breast cancer — FDA approved as first-line treatment regimen.
Chugai Pharma — Avastin (bevacizumab) — Additional indication — Japan regulatory approval granted for expanded use of the monoclonal antibody.
Roche/Chugai — Rituxan (rituximab) — Nephrotic syndrome — Japan regulatory approval granted for additional dosage regimen of the monoclonal antibody.

TrueLab — TL-001 — Immune-mediated inflammatory diseases — Granted exclusive worldwide rights to Bionyra; asset is an anti-TL1A monoclonal antibody; deal value ~$985M including milestones and royalties.

AbbVie — Zumilokibart (APG777) — Atopic dermatitis — Acquired Apogee Therapeutics for ~$10.9B; asset is a late-stage half-life-extended monoclonal antibody targeting IL-13; transaction expected to close Q3 2026.
Apogee Therapeutics — APG273 — Asthma — Combination therapy of zumilokibart (anti-IL-13 mAb) and APG333 (anti-TSLP mAb); included in AbbVie acquisition portfolio.
MappBio — MBP-134 — Bundibugyo ebolavirus — Monoclonal antibody entering clinical trial in DRC to evaluate efficacy against third-largest recorded Ebola outbreak with 1,118 confirmed cases.

Incyte / MorphoSys — tafasitamab (Monjuvi) — Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma — Phase 3 frontMIND trial primary results presented at ASCO 2026 evaluating combination with lenalidomide and R-CHOP in newly diagnosed high-risk patients.
AstraZeneca — surovatamig (AZD0486) — Follicular Lymphoma — Phase 3 SOUNDTRACK-F1 trial initial safety run-in data presented at EHA 2026 in previously untreated patients.
Genmab — epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly) — Diffuse Large B-Cell Lymphoma — Phase 2 study (NCT06045247) data presented at ASCO 2026 evaluating combination with R-miniCVP in elderly and frail patients.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Intranasal immunotherapy commercialization — Foralumab (anti-CD3 mAb) — Phase 2 INFORM-MS trial completed; 14 patients in Expanded Access Program showed 100% disease stability or improvement.
RQ Bio — Long-acting antibody therapeutics development — RQB01 (influenza prophylaxis) — $115M Series A raised; IND-enabling studies in progress; Christian S. Schade appointed Executive Chairman.

Artiva Biotherapeutics — Cell therapy commercialization in autoimmune disease — AlloNK (AB-101) + rituximab — RMAT designation secured; Phase 2a data supports outpatient deep B-cell depletion strategy.
Coherus Oncology — Commercialization of PD-1 monoclonal antibody LOQTORZI — toripalimab-tpzi — Q1 2026 revenue $11.8M (+61% YoY); Phase 2 1L HCC trial with anti-IL27 casdozokitug fully enrolled.
AstraZeneca (Alexion) — Monoclonal antibody development for IgA Nephropathy — ULTOMIRIS (ravulizumab) — Listed among key pipeline therapies in DelveInsight's 2026 IgA Nephropathy report.
Merck — Expansion of immuno-oncology portfolio in breast cancer — Keytruda (pembrolizumab) — FDA approval secured for combination with Trodelvy in PD-L1+ advanced TNBC.
Chugai Pharma — Monoclonal antibody portfolio expansion — Avastin (bevacizumab) — Secured additional indication approval in Japan.
Roche/Chugai — Monoclonal antibody lifecycle management — Rituxan (rituximab) — Secured additional dosage approval for nephrotic syndrome in Japan.
TrueLab — Strategic licensing of monoclonal antibody assets — TL-001 (anti-TL1A mAb) and TL-003 — Secured ~$985M deal with Bionyra; received single-digit equity stake in partner.
Apogee Therapeutics — Acquisition by AbbVie — Zumilokibart (APG777) — Late-stage half-life-extended monoclonal antibody targeting IL-13 for atopic dermatitis; acquired for ~$10.9B.
AbbVie — Immunology portfolio expansion — Zumilokibart (APG777) — Acquired Apogee Therapeutics to integrate late-stage monoclonal antibody targeting IL-13; deal value ~$10.9B.

Bionyra — Commercialization of anti-TL1A therapies — TL-001 (monoclonal antibody) + TL-003 (bispecific) — Secured exclusive worldwide rights from TrueLab; raised $165M Series A led by Jeito Capital and Sofinnova Partners.
MappBio — Ebola therapeutic development — MBP-134 (monoclonal antibody) — Clinical trial initiated in DRC to assess monotherapy and combination efficacy with remdesivir against Bundibugyo ebolavirus.

Incyte / MorphoSys — Frontline DLBCL treatment advancement — tafasitamab (Monjuvi) — Phase 3 frontMIND trial results presented at ASCO 2026 supporting combination regimen in high-risk newly diagnosed patients.
AstraZeneca — Chemo-free follicular lymphoma strategies — surovatamig (AZD0486) — Phase 3 SOUNDTRACK-F1 trial ongoing with initial safety data presented at EHA 2026.
Genmab — Elderly/frail DLBCL treatment optimization — epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly) — Phase 2 trial data presented at ASCO 2026 evaluating reduced-intensity combination with R-miniCVP.

Foralumab — Mechanism: Fully human anti-CD3 monoclonal antibody stimulating T regulatory cells — Phase: 2 (INFORM-MS) — Population: Non-active Secondary Progressive Multiple Sclerosis — Comparator: Placebo (in Phase 2a) — Results: 100% of 14 patients in Expanded Access Program showed improvement or stability within 6 months.

RQB01 — Mechanism: Dual-mechanism long-acting antibody targeting conserved influenza epitopes — Phase: IND-enabling — Population: High-risk and immunocompromised populations — Goal: Single-administration seasonal protection.

AlloNK + rituximab — Mechanism: Allogeneic NK cell therapy combined with anti-CD20 monoclonal antibody (rituximab) — Phase: 2a — Population: Refractory rheumatoid arthritis, Sjögren disease, systemic sclerosis — Comparator: None stated — Results: 71% ACR50 response at 6 months in 31 patients; deep B-cell depletion observed.

LOQTORZI (toripalimab-tpzi) — Mechanism: PD-1 checkpoint inhibitor monoclonal antibody — Phase: Commercial/Combination trials — Population: Recurrent, locally advanced or metastatic nasopharyngeal carcinoma — Status: Only FDA-approved therapy in U.S. for this indication.

Zigakibart (FUB523) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting B-cell activating factor (BAFF) — Phase: Clinical development — Population: IgA Nephropathy — Status: Active pipeline candidate per DelveInsight 2026 report.
Felzartamab (MOR202) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting CD38 — Phase: Clinical development — Population: IgA Nephropathy — Status: Active pipeline candidate per DelveInsight 2026 report.
NM8074 (Ruxoprubart) — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting C5 — Phase: Clinical development — Population: IgA Nephropathy — Status: Active pipeline candidate per DelveInsight 2026 report.

ULTOMIRIS (ravulizumab) — Mechanism: Long-acting monoclonal antibody targeting C5 — Phase: Clinical development — Population: IgA Nephropathy — Status: Active pipeline candidate per DelveInsight 2026 report.

Keytruda (pembrolizumab) — Mechanism: PD-1 blocking monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: PD-L1+ (CPS ≥10) advanced triple-negative breast cancer — Comparator: Not specified in approval context — Outcome: Approved in combination with Trodelvy as first-line therapy.

Avastin (bevacizumab) — Mechanism: VEGF-A inhibition monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: Patients with expanded indication in Japan — Comparator: N/A — Results: Regulatory approval for new indication granted.

Rituxan (rituximab) — Mechanism: CD20-targeting monoclonal antibody — Phase: Approved — Population: Patients with certain nephrotic syndrome — Comparator: N/A — Results: Regulatory approval for additional dosage regimen granted.
TL-001 — Mechanism: Anti-TL1A monoclonal antibody — Phase: Preclinical/Development — Indication: Immune-mediated inflammatory diseases — Status: Rights granted to Bionyra for global development.
Zumilokibart (APG777) — Mechanism: Half-life-extended monoclonal antibody targeting IL-13 — Phase: Late-stage — Indication: Atopic dermatitis — Status: Lead asset in Apogee acquisition by AbbVie.
APG333 — Mechanism: Anti-TSLP monoclonal antibody — Phase: Clinical — Indication: Asthma (in combination with zumilokibart) — Status: Part of APG273 combination therapy in Apogee pipeline.

MBP-134 — Mechanism: Monoclonal antibody targeting Bundibugyo ebolavirus — Phase: Clinical trial — Population: Patients in Democratic Republic of the Congo with confirmed Ebola infection — Comparator: Gilead Sciences' remdesivir (antiviral) — Endpoint: Efficacy of monotherapy and combination therapy against fast-growing outbreak.

tafasitamab (Monjuvi) — Mechanism: CD19-directed monoclonal antibody — Phase: 3 (frontMIND) — Population: Newly diagnosed high-risk DLBCL — Comparator: R-CHOP backbone — Endpoints: Primary results presented at ASCO 2026 evaluating addition of lenalidomide and tafasitamab.

surovatamig (AZD0486) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody (CD20/CD3) — Phase: 3 (SOUNDTRACK-F1) — Population: Previously untreated follicular lymphoma — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints: Initial safety run-in data presented at EHA 2026.

epcoritamab-bysp (Epkinly) — Mechanism: Bispecific antibody (CD20/CD3) — Phase: 2 — Population: Elderly and frail patients with newly diagnosed DLBCL — Comparator: Not specified — Endpoints: Safety and efficacy data presented at ASCO 2026 for combination with R-miniCVP.

Tiziana Life Sciences — Executive Chairman share purchase — Foralumab pipeline — Gabriele Cerrone acquired 15,000 common shares at $1.11/share, increasing total holding to 44,772,230 shares (34.89% of issued capital).

RQ Bio — Secured $115 million (£85.5 million) Series A financing led by Frazier Life Sciences with participation from EQT Life Sciences, Forbion, Monograph, Wellington Management, and LifeArc Ventures.

Coherus Oncology — Clinical collaboration agreement — ZM008 + LOQTORZI (toripalimab-tpzi) — Partnership with Zumutor Biologics to evaluate combination of ZM008 with the PD-1 monoclonal antibody toripalimab.
TrueLab / Bionyra — ~$985M licensing deal — TL-001 (anti-TL1A mAb) and TL-003 — Includes upfront, milestone, and royalty payments; TrueLab receives single-digit equity stake in Bionyra.
AbbVie / Apogee Therapeutics — ~$10.9B acquisition — Zumilokibart (APG777) and APG273 — Cash offer of $135.11/share; expected closing Q3 2026 subject to regulatory approval.
